welcome.title: Welcome to Elevare, {name}!
welcome.description: Let's take a quick tour to help you get started with the platform. We'll show you the key features to make your learning journey easier.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.description: This is your command center. Customize widgets by dragging and resizing them to fit your workflow.

tasks.title: Task Management
tasks.description: Manage your assignments and deadlines. Set priorities, add tags, and track your progress.

notes.title: Smart Notes
notes.description: Take rich-text notes with AI-powered summarization. Organize notes into color-coded folders.

groups.title: Study Groups
groups.description: Collaborate with classmates in real-time. Chat, use whiteboards, and video call together.

resources.title: Resource Library
resources.description: Share and discover study materials. Upload files and browse resources from others.

notifications.title: Stay Updated
notifications.description: Get real-time notifications for messages, tasks, and group activities.

profile.title: Profile & Settings
profile.description: Customize your profile and preferences. Switch between English, Nepali, and Korean.

completion.title: You're All Set!
completion.description: You've completed the tour and are ready to start using Elevare to organize your academic life.
completion.summary: You learned about: Dashboard, Tasks, Notes, Study Groups, Resources, Notifications, and Profile settings.

controls.tourSkipped: Tutorial skipped. You can always access help from the menu.
